privileged_info_summary: The fire drill evacuation map task requires creating a flipchart file at /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/fire_evacuation_plan.flipchart containing specific text labels (Fire, Evacuation, Teacher, Desk, Door, Exit), a minimum of 6 shapes representing room layout and furniture, and at least 3 arrows indicating an evacuation route. The task is based on creating synthetic content (user-generated flipchart) with no external public data sources involved.
